title: Endpoint/router/SRAM composition for reciprocal-LUT Llama7B frontier
hypothesis: The q12 reciprocal-LUT endpoint frontier remains selected when endpoint ready/valid service is composed with measured endpoint/router/FIFO/SRAM evidence.

direct_comparison.primary_question: Does concrete endpoint/router/SRAM composition expose a width, replication, queue, or SRAM area gap that changes the selected Llama7B reciprocal-LUT frontier?
include: ready/valid endpoint service result for reciprocal-LUT q12 frontier
endpoint full on-chip service r2 result
router, FIFO, endpoint, and SRAM evidence paths
follow_on_broad_sweep: measured SRAM rebalance or HBM/DRAM service closure if composition succeeds

expected_benefit: reduce the remaining on-chip endpoint/router/SRAM abstraction for the selected Llama7B frontier
identify exact L1 PPA gaps before treating the on-chip path as closed
risks: composition may reveal that additional L1 router/SRAM/endpoint PPA points are needed
HBM/DRAM service remains inherited after this step

expected_result.reason: Use the reciprocal-LUT ready/valid result and corrected q12 on-chip frontier to audit endpoint/router/SRAM composition.
